title: 1. Treating pains: In general, in treating the pain syndromes, needling the oppo
text:
appropriate.  The reason is because the nerves cross to the opposite side of the body.  This matches the
so-called “cross channel needling is called MiaoCi, which means to needle the right side of the body when
the disease is located in the left side”. (Ode of Elucidate Mysteries).
